arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag mocked on Dutch TV over Manchester United's poor start to season
arts.sum: Football legend Ruud Gullit poked up at the manager’s repeated references to his ‘process’

arts.ttl: Jamie Redknapp can't resist on-air Erik ten Hag dig during Carabao Cup draw
arts.sum: Jamie Redknapp has been involved in a bitter war of words with Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag after his Marcus Rashford claims and couldn’t stop himself during Wednesday’s Carabao Cup draw

arts.ttl: I heard Old Trafford reaction to viral moment that showed Man United have a superstar in their squad again
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford continued his impressive start to the season against FC Twente but he was taken off by Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag with the game still level.

arts.ttl: Smiling Sam Lammers opens door for Rangers to spring Man Utd surprise as THAT goal gets fans saying 'they must be p***'
arts.sum: If Lammers can do it at Old Trafford then why can't Rangers?

arts.ttl: Man Utd's next three fixtures before international break as pressure grows on Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Manchester United face a succession of tricky matches before the upcoming international break, with Erik ten Hag under mounting pressure to deliver following a draw vs FC Twente

arts.ttl: Sign Ben Chilwell, England blame, get rid - Luke Shaw Manchester United future verdict
arts.sum: Luke Shaw's recovery from an ongoing calf issue has suffered a further setback, so much so he might not return for Man United until after the October international break.

arts.ttl: Unseen FC Twente reaction to Manchester United draw reminded Erik ten Hag of his top priority
arts.sum: Man Utd threw away a lead to draw 1-1 with FC Twente at Old Trafford as their Europa League campaign got off to a disappointing start.

arts.ttl: Manchester United academy notebook: two exciting signings unveiled as Obi-Martin update given
arts.sum: This week's Man Utd academy notebook on the latest ongoings, brought to you by the Manchester Evening News.

arts.ttl: Manchester United's current reality is that of a Europa League side
arts.sum: Manchester United can't afford to fail in the UEFA Europa League, as manager Erik ten Hag looks to impress the new INEOs bosses this season.

arts.ttl: Ten Hag: United didn't finish fight in Twente draw
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag questioned his players' mentality after Manchester United's 1-1 draw with FC Twente in the Europa League by saying that the Dutch side "fought for every yard and we didn't."
